title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at McDonald's India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at McDonald's India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, McDonald's India Digital Technologies in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About McDonald's India Digital Technologies:
McDonald's India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India Digital Technologies!
